entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A major crop and source of daily protein intake in south Asia and sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A nutritional trait measured in pearl millet germplasm with variation between 10.06% and 20.31%

entities.description: Nutritional traits measured in pearl millet germplasm that show diverse patterns and negative correlation with protein content

entities.description: A geographical region where pearl millet is a primary protein source

entities.description: A geographical region where pearl millet is a primary protein source
